name: Plum-Almond Tart
recipeIngredient: 2/3 cup Toasted sliced almonds, finely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F. On lightly floured surface, roll thawed pastry sheet to a 14x12 inch rectangle. With sharp knife, cut off 2 inches from one side to make a 12-inch square; cut the remaining lengthwise into four 1/2-inch wide strips. Brush edges of pastry square with water; attach a pastry strip on top of each edge, pressing gently and trimming to fit. Place on baking sheet.
2. Sprinkle almonds over pastry (not over strips).
3. In a bowl, combine plums, 1/4 cup sugar, and the lemon zest; toss to combine. Arrange plums, overlapping, in rows over almonds; reserve any juices from plums. Sprinkle plums with remaining 2 tablespoons sugar. Bake for 20 to 25 minutes or until browned and bubbly. Brush top with any reserved plum juice. Serve warm or at room temperature.
